positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical silhouette of a minimalist astronaut floating through a nebula composed of deep indigo, royal blue, and metallic silver gas clouds. The astronaut should be outlined with clean, sharp edges, resembling a stencil print. Foreground elements include abstract geometric constellations and sparkling, crystalline star clusters. Use a high-contrast, graphic design aesthetic with glowing neon accents outlining the suit and equipment. Composition must be perfectly centered and suitable for apparel printing. Vector art, clean lines, deep contrast, pop art style, graphic novel illustration, high detail.
negative: blurry, low resolution, noisy, artifacts, text, watermarks, logos, signatures, poor anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, messy, complex background, gradient, soft focus
